name: SearXNG
description: A privacy-respecting metasearch engine that aggregates results from many search services without tracking you.
compose:
name: "slashnode-searxng"
services:
  redis:
    image: "valkey/valkey:8-alpine"
    container_name: "searxng-redis"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    command: "valkey-server --save 30 1 --loglevel warning"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - "searxng-redis-data:/data"
  searxng:
    image: "searxng/searxng:latest"
    container_name: "searxng"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SEARXNG_BASE_URL: "${self.exports.url}"
      SEARXNG_REDIS_URL: "redis://searxng-redis:6379/0"
      UWSGI_WORKERS: "4"
      UWSGI_THREADS: "4"
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:8080:8080"
    volumes:
      - "searxng-config:/etc/searxng"
    depends_on:
      - redis
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  searxng-config:
    name: "slashnode-searxng_searxng_searxng-config"
  searxng-redis-data:
    name: "slashnode-searxng_searxng_searxng-redis-data"
notes: Privacy-respecting metasearch engine (SearXNG) with a Valkey/Redis cache. On first start it generates a settings.yml with a random secret in the searxng-config volume. Reached behind Caddy + the admin login.
